evidence_basis: DISTILLED-home-usage-load-chains.md <audit-session>: frontend source tree only (<source-location>/src/), no IDA backend analysis. gate_accepted=false (frontend CCF only, no backend IDA verification; consumers can start with product decision).
note: This bundle covers frontend load chains only — no backend IDA decompile. Backend evidence for the underlying commands (load_usage_analytics, load_tool_analytics, load_snapshot, load_bootstrap_state, etc.) lives in their respective module bundles. Gate tier consumerStartReady: source archive can start implementation using frontend load chain facts; backend dim2/dim3/dim4/dim5 must come from per-command bundles.

cluster_gate_summary.note: Frontend-only bundle; backend verification delegated to per-command bundles
